text: The surgeon uses the tips of the instrument on the flashing left arm to slide a ring off the peg, then hands it over to the other flashing arm before returning to the horizontal peg.
The left arm of the surgical robot twists its fingers to lay a ring onto a peg, demonstrating precise control and manipulation.
The surgeon uses the tips of the robotic instruments to gently grasp the ring, transferring it from the left arm to the right arm while simultaneously releasing it with the left arm.
The robotic arms move in a coordinated fashion, synchronized with the foot pedal, demonstrating precise control and manipulation of the instruments.

The left robotic arm turns red, indicating a potential error or alert in the system.
